content.en:
Ye Tian calmed down, rested every long time, emptied his mind, and continued to comprehend the holy technique after he recovered.

And just like that, trillion years and trillions of years passed.

As more and more holy skills stepped into the extreme realm one by one, Ye Tian's strength naturally became stronger and stronger, and he was already much stronger than in the past.

this day.

Ye Tian's last holy technique, the Streamer Light Holy Technique, also stepped into the extreme realm, marking that all of Ye Tianhui's holy skills had been upgraded to the extreme realm, and it also meant that his cultivation this time was over.

"The body has been eroded to the extent that it is three-in-three!"

Ye Tian looked at his body and muttered.

There was still a long time left, and it would be a bit of a waste to leave like this, and he was ready to continue cultivating for a while.

But the holy skills have been cultivated, there is no way to continue to improve, and it is useless to improve the cultivation, what else can you do?

Ye Tian pondered for a while, preparing to perfect his Endless Domain Method, and then create a holy technique suitable for himself, so as not to waste time!

As a result, Ye Tian spent tens of millions of years perfecting his Endless Domain Method, making it more perfect than in the past, and making up for some loopholes, after all, the Endless Domain Law was created by Ye Tian a long time ago, and at that time, his cultivation was still low, and he had not yet stepped into the realm of the Supreme Domain Ancestor, and many theories were speculated.

Now, he has really stepped into the realm of the Supreme Domain Ancestor, and there are a few loopholes in some aspects, although the impact is not great, but it is naturally best to improve it now.

After the improvement, the Endless Domain Law is more suitable for him, and it can improve his cultivation and refine the domain body and domain power faster.

Subsequently, Ye Tian began to try to create a holy technique!

Under normal circumstances, only a Superior Domain Ancestor is qualified to create a Holy Technique, and it is more difficult for an Invincible Domain Ancestor to create a Holy Technique.

However, if Ye Tian spent a lot of time, he really had the hope of creating a holy technique.

Because he has cultivated a variety of holy techniques, and all of them have cultivated to the extreme realm, his understanding of holy techniques even surpasses that of the Peerless Domain Ancestor, so he has the hope of creating holy techniques.

"Let's create a time holy skill, I only have a time holy skill now, and I need to create another time holy skill!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

His eternal skill can stand the time, and its power is terrifying.

However, he didn't need to fix the Holy Technique of Time anymore, that would be equivalent to overlapping with the Eternal Holy Technique.

One of the same holy skills is enough, and one more is a waste.

Therefore, Ye Tian was ready to create another time holy technique.

After thinking about it for a long time, Ye Tian thought about it, and he was ready to create a holy technique that could spy on future pieces.

In this way, in the middle of the battle, you can spy on what moves and hole cards the opponent will perform, so as to deal with it, so as not to be killed by the opponent's hole cards.

This time, he needs to compete with many of the strongest domain ancestors of the Ghost Fox Organization, in case the opponent has a rare hole card that can inflict a killing blow on him, and he doesn't react in time, then he will die.

Therefore, if you have a holy skill that can spy on future pieces, you will not be afraid of any means of the other party.

"Just create in this direction!"

Ye Tian decided.

100 million years and 100 million years have passed, Ye Tian went from being at a loss at the beginning, to slowly having a little clue, then to a little sign, and then to starting to create a preliminary ......

Ye Tian was extremely sure that he could create a time holy technique, and he could withstand the passage of time, coupled with the fact that the time realm was full of the power of time, it was indeed very suitable for creating a time holy technique.

Ye Tian tried to create again and again, applying to continuously use the prototype of the incomplete time saint technique of a gate, so as to improve and transform.

In this way, the erosion degree of Ye Tian's body slowly changed from four to three, four to four, four to five, and four to six.

As the erosion of Ye Tian's body gradually approached forty to nine, Ye Tian was also a little anxious.

In any case, once he was infinitely close to the 50% erosion level, he had to leave, and he didn't want to leave his life to luck.

"The Time Divine Technique has still not been created!"

Ye Tian tried his best to calm his impatient mood and continued to create.

After a long period of time, the erosion of Ye Tian's body reached forty percent of nine.

At this time, Ye Tian's Time Saint Technique had not yet been created, but it was very close to being created, and it seemed that it could be created at any time.

Now, Ye Tian is not in a hurry, even if he really can't create it, after going out, he should have hope to create it with the help of other treasures of the Battle Gate.

After all, there are still some treasures for creating the magic domain during the battle gate, although the effect is not necessarily very rebellious, but it is much better than the creation effect of the time realm.

The realm of time is only able to allow people to have countless years of time to cultivate, but it actually has no auxiliary effect.

With such a mentality, Ye Tian's mood entered the water, but the speed of creation was much faster.

Just when the erosion level of Ye Tian's body was about to reach fifty percent, Ye Tian finally succeeded in creating it.

"Hahahaha, it's finally created!"

Ye Tian shouted excitedly, and his voice spread throughout the entire Time Realm.

This time, it had taken him so long, so long that he had almost lost track of time, just to check the extent of his body's erosion.

In short, he succeeded, creating his first self-created sacred technique.

"This time holy technique is called a time fragment!"

Ye Tian took the name.

The Holy Technique Time Fragment was created, Ye Tian was not ready to cultivate here, he didn't want his body to be assimilated by the Well of Time after the erosion level reached fifty percent, it would be too unlucky.

"It's time to leave, and after you go out, you can cultivate the Holy Technique Time Fragment!"

Ye Tian's heart moved, and he urged a token.

This token can take him out of the realm of time, otherwise he would not have been able to leave on his own.

"Leave!"

Ye Tian urged the token and disappeared from the realm of time in an instant.

......

Temple of Time.

After the two Invincible Domain Ancestor guards saw Ye Tian enter the realm of time, they came out again in an instant, but their aura changed greatly, which was not strange at all.

They also knew that Ye Tian had been cultivating in the Time Realm for a long time, and it was normal that he had just come out and not entered the demon.

Many Invincible Domain Ancestors entered the realm of time, and after they came out, they were almost all about to enter the demon, and their breath was extremely chaotic.

Comparatively speaking, Ye Tian is a very normal one.

Ye Tian didn't stay here, and soon left the Temple of Time and returned to his residence.

In the following days, Ye Tian did not cultivate, he had cultivated for too long years, where would he cultivate now, even if he had just created the Time Fragment Saint Technique, he did not go to cultivate, but after resting for a few days, he entered the continent and the world of the War Realm Tower to practice.

In this way, he will be able to fully recover.

In fact, the moment the body was copied, Ye Tian's body also received the memory, and he had no choice but to go out and practice in various places in the Xuanxu Saint Realm, if he didn't practice, I was afraid that he would be bored with cultivation, and the problem would be too big!

In the blink of an eye, thousands of years have passed!
